title: Audit an IAM policy for over-broad scope
description: Inspect an IAM policy or role for wildcard actions, wildcard resources, and unused permissions, reporting each over-grant against least privilege.
body: Use when reviewing an IAM policy, role, or service account. Actions: parse the policy statements and flag Action:* or Resource:* grants, admin-equivalent permissions, and permissions the workload's access patterns never use; compare granted actions against observed usage where available. Report each finding with the statement and a tighter suggested scope. Do not approve a wildcard grant as 'temporary'. This skill exposes capability only and must not modify policies without runtime permission. Validation signals include a findings list mapping each over-grant to a narrower policy and, where available, access-analyzer/last-used evidence. Risk boundary: a wildcard-admin grant on a workload identity is a privilege-escalation risk; flag for human approval and recommend scoping rather than auto-applying.
